titles.text: SuperLite1500シリーズ アンゴルモア99

descriptions.text: "Angolmois99" is an addictive simple card game based on the prophecy of Nostradamus and includes real-life parody. Users become the earth's representative and compete against the Angolmois Four in card games that will decide the destiny of the planet. Luck, insight, intuition and split-second strategic judgement will determine who is the winner. Get ready for the game!
